name: openmark-router
description: Benchmark-driven model routing for OpenClaw, powered by OpenMark AI (https://openmark.ai). Routes tasks to optimal models using real evaluation data — accuracy, cost, latency, stability — not keyword heuristics or complexity tiers. An agent:bootstrap hook auto-injects benchmark categories into the agent's context. The LLM's only job is semantic matching; code handles everything else: provider detection, routing math, model switching, fallback setup, routing card. Supports manual lock for extended work on a single task. 5 routing strategies. Direct API providers and OpenRouter. Zero external dependencies.
author: openmarkai
